description: arXiv API search queries for the Research org literature radar. Run: pnpm literature:radar

queries.label: Representation collapse & rank
queries.searchQuery: all:"dimensional collapse" OR all:"effective rank" AND (embedding OR contrastive)

queries.label: Dense retrieval & RAG embeddings
queries.searchQuery: all:"dense retrieval" AND (embedding OR bi-encoder) AND (RAG OR "retrieval augmented")

queries.label: Small / efficient embedding models
queries.searchQuery: all:"embedding model" AND (efficient OR small OR edge OR on-device OR quantization)

queries.label: Contrastive & self-supervised text encoders
queries.searchQuery: all:InfoNCE AND (sentence OR text) AND embedding
